title: Goldsmith export line
description: One JSONL line of a Goldsmith dataset export. This is a public contract consumed by other repos' eval scripts (DocFlow, Insight, Conveyor). Its shape changes ONLY with a version bump and a note in docs/decisions.md (CLAUDE.md rule 1). One object per line; parse each line with json.loads (see docs/PLAN.md reference reader).

id.description: Stable example id, ULID-based, stable across versions.

input.description: Preset-specific input object (e.g. {"file_ref": "storage://..."} or {"text": "..."}) or free-form for custom datasets.

expected.description: The verified expected output, validated against the dataset's own JSON Schema before it was saved.

tags.description: Free-form slice tags on the example.

provenance.description: How the expected value was produced.

dataset.description: The dataset slug the example belongs to (e.g. "docflow-invoices").

dataset_version.description: The dataset version this export was taken at.
